results.title: Diplomatic Ultimatum Before Battle: Angada’s Mission and Rama’s Doctrine of Armed Restraint
results.description: This is the moment where diplomacy and war stand side by side. Rama has the strength to attack, yet he first gives Ravana a clear choice. The message carries moral authority, political clarity and military pressure in one frame. It offers a path to peace while displaying the certainty of force. In defence terms, this is a classic pre-war ultimatum. It places responsibility on the aggressor, fixes the terms of settlement and prepares the battlefield psychologically before the first full strike begins. The post Diplomatic Ultimatum Before Battle: Angada’s Mission and Rama’s Doctrine of Armed Restraint appeared first on Dharmakshethra - India Unabridged .

results.title: Cllr Alec Cormack re-elected as Saundersfoot Chair for 2026-27
results.description: At the recent Annual General Meeting of Saundersfoot Community Council, Cllr Alec Cormack was once again installed as chair.

results.title: Forgotten people: Palestine's Bedouin face forced displacement as Israel advances its E1 master plan
results.description: The proposed expansion of Israeli settlements in the West Bank threatens Bedouin communities, any hope of a two-state solution and the credibility of international peace efforts.

results.title: Progress being made on language standards in North despite opposition from vocal minority
results.description: Northern Ireland’s Irish Language Commissioner Pól Deeds expects to be drafting standards for the treatment of Irish during the Summer with a view to putting them out for public consultation shortly afterwards.
